case_title: GARRY GAMA WIN RAYMOND VS. MAJLISH DURJAY ABU BAKER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAYMOND, GARRY GAMA WIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAKER, MAJLISH DURJAY ABU *PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT INJURIES WERE CAUSED BY ACTIONS OF DEFENDANT BY A PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE.
